source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of mesenchymal progenitor cells in adipose tissue
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal fibroblast/adipocyte progenitor cells
CD34 marks adipose-derived stromal/progenitor cells and is used to isolate adipocyte precursors
CD248 (endosialin) is expressed on mesenchymal stromal cells including adipocyte precursors
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in adipose progenitors and regulates adipogenesis through IGF signaling
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an extracellular matrix gene characteristic of mesenchymal progenitor cells
MFAP5 encodes microfibrillar-associated protein 5, marking fibroblastic adipocyte precursors
COL1A1 is a major collagen gene expressed by mesenchymal/fibroblastic adipocyte precursors
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in adipose progenitor populations
PROCR (CD201) marks multipotent mesenchymal progenitors including adipocyte precursors
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex and a definitive B cell lineage marker
MS4A1 (CD20) is a canonical B cell surface marker used clinically to identify B cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells for MHC class II antigen presentation
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is essential for B cell survival and a specific B cell marker
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
CD79B is the second component of the BCR signaling complex, specific to B cells
IGKC (immunoglobulin kappa constant) reflects immunoglobulin production by B cells and plasma cells
JCHAIN is expressed in antibody-secreting B cells/plasmablasts for immunoglobulin polymerization
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B lymphocytes
SPIB is a transcription factor critical for B cell development and function
TRGC2 (T cell receptor gamma constant 2) is a defining marker of gamma delta T cells
TRDC (T cell receptor delta constant) identifies gamma delta T cells
CD7 is a T/NK cell marker highly expressed on gamma delta T cells
LEF1 is a transcription factor associated with naive/memory T cell states in gamma delta T cells
TCF7 marks less differentiated T cells and is characteristic of tissue-resident gamma delta T cells
KLRC2 (NKG2C) is an activating NK receptor expressed on gamma delta T cell subsets
IL7R marks gamma delta T cells that depend on IL-7 for homeostatic maintenance
ZNF683 (Hobit) is a transcription factor defining tissue-resident lymphocytes including gamma delta T cells
FXYD2 is differentially expressed in gamma delta T cell subsets and distinguishes them from other T cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule highly expressed in cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a key cytotoxic granule protease defining cytotoxic T cell function
GZMH (granzyme H) is a cytotoxic effector molecule enriched in terminally differentiated CD8+ T cells
CD8A is the canonical surface marker defining CD8+ T cells
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for cytotoxic granule-mediated killing by CD8+ T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein marking activated cytotoxic lymphocytes
FGFBP2 is highly expressed in terminally differentiated cytotoxic CD8+ T cells and NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine constitutively expressed by effector/memory CD8+ T cells
CD3G is a TCR complex component confirming T cell identity
CLDN5 (claudin-5) is a tight junction protein and canonical endothelial cell marker
PECAM1 (CD31) is a definitive endothelial cell surface marker used for identification
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is produced by endothelial cells and is a classic endothelial marker
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
FABP4 is highly expressed in capillary endothelial cells involved in fatty acid transport
CD36 is a fatty acid translocase expressed on capillary endothelial cells
ESAM (endothelial cell-selective adhesion molecule) is specifically expressed on endothelial cells
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor specifically expressed on endothelial cells
EMCN (endomucin) is a sialomucin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
ICAM2 is constitutively expressed on endothelial cells and used as an endothelial marker
GZMK (granzyme K) marks immature/less differentiated NK cells compared to GZMB+ mature NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory receptor enriched on immature NK cells
NCAM1 (CD56) is the canonical NK cell marker, with bright expression on immature NK cells
CD2 is expressed on NK cells and is involved in NK cell adhesion and activation
SELL (CD62L) marks immature/less differentiated NK cells that retain lymph node homing capacity
TCF7 is a transcription factor marking immature/less differentiated NK cells
XCL2 is a chemokine produced by NK cells, particularly immature subsets
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic molecule expressed by NK cells
CMC1 is enriched in NK cell populations and distinguishes them from T cells
IL2RB (CD122) is expressed on NK cells and is essential for IL-15-mediated NK cell development
IL1B is a hallmark pro-inflammatory cytokine of classically activated inflammatory macrophages
CXCL8 (IL-8) is a neutrophil-recruiting chemokine produced by inflammatory macrophages
CD163 is a scavenger receptor and macrophage lineage marker
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein widely used as a pan-macrophage marker
TNF is a key pro-inflammatory cytokine defining the inflammatory macrophage phenotype
PTGS2 (COX-2) is an inducible enzyme characteristic of inflammatory macrophage activation
CXCL3 is a pro-inflammatory chemokine highly expressed by activated inflammatory macrophages
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine produced by inflammatory macrophages for immune cell recruitment
C1QA is a complement component produced by macrophages, marking their phagocytic function
NLRP3 inflammasome is a hallmark of inflammatory macrophage activation
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of innate lymphoid cells across all ILC subsets
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for ILC2 and is expressed across ILC populations
IL7R (CD127) is a key surface marker for ILC identification
KIT (CD117) is expressed on ILC progenitors and ILC3 subsets
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is highly expressed on ILCs and marks activated innate lymphoid cells
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on activated ILCs and involved in ILC survival
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33R) is a key receptor on ILC2s for IL-33 responsiveness
AREG (amphiregulin) is a tissue-repair effector molecule produced by ILCs
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for ILC development and lineage commitment
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine highly expressed in ILC1s
TBX21 (T-bet) is the master transcription factor defining ILC1 identity
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILC1s and NK cells
IL7R (CD127) distinguishes ILC1s from NK cells among group 1 ILCs
ZNF683 (Hobit) is a transcription factor marking tissue-resident ILC1s
ITGB1 (CD29) is expressed on ILC1s and involved in tissue residency
ETS1 is a transcription factor important for ILC1 development and function
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical ILC marker expressed on ILC1s
SPOCK2 is enriched in ILC1 populations and distinguishes them from other ILC subsets
IL1RL1 (ST2) is the IL-33 receptor and a canonical ILC2 surface marker
GATA3 is the master transcription factor defining ILC2 identity
HPGD (prostaglandin dehydrogenase) is highly expressed in ILC2s for prostaglandin metabolism
RORA is a transcription factor essential for ILC2 development
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of ILC2s
IL7R (CD127) is a key ILC2 surface marker used for identification
PTGDR2 (CRTH2) is a canonical ILC2 marker used for flow cytometric identification
HPGDS (hematopoietic prostaglandin D synthase) is specifically expressed in ILC2s
IL2RA (CD25) is expressed on activated ILC2s
SLAMF1 is highly expressed on ILC2s and involved in their activation
KIT (CD117) is a canonical surface marker of ILC3s
CCR6 marks the LTi-like ILC3 subset and is a key ILC3 identifier
IL7R (CD127) is essential for ILC3 survival and a canonical ILC3 marker
IL1R1 is expressed on ILC3s and mediates IL-1β responsiveness
TNFSF11 (RANKL) is expressed by ILC3s, particularly LTi-like cells
DLL1 is a Notch ligand expressed by ILC3s involved in immune regulation
ICOS is expressed on ILC3s and involved in their activation and cytokine production
HOXA9 is a transcription factor involved in ILC3 development
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is produced by ILC3s for lymphoid tissue organogenesis
RUNX2 is a transcription factor associated with ILC3 differentiation
KIT (CD117) marks ILC precursors and is essential for their development
IL7R (CD127) is a canonical marker of ILC precursors
SPINK2 is a marker of hematopoietic progenitors including ILC precursors
SELL (CD62L) marks circulating ILC precursors with lymph node homing capacity

GATA3 is expressed in ILC precursors as they commit to the ILC lineage

FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein defining lipid-associated macrophages (LAMs)
FABP5 is a lipid-handling protein characteristic of lipid-laden macrophages
APOE is a hallmark gene of lipid-associated macrophages involved in lipid metabolism
TREM2 is a canonical marker of lipid-associated macrophages across tissues
SPP1 (osteopontin) is highly expressed in lipid-associated macrophages

LGALS3 (galectin-3) is highly expressed in lipid-associated macrophages
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule highly expressed in mature NK cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a key cytotoxic molecule in mature NK cells
FCGR3A (CD16) is a canonical marker of mature/cytotoxic NK cells mediating ADCC
KLRF1 (NKp80) is an activating receptor specific to NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor marking mature NK cells
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for NK cell cytotoxicity
SPON2 is specifically expressed in mature CD56dim NK cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated mature NK cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein highly expressed in mature NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is part of the NK cell signaling complex
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of MAIT cells
SLC4A10 is a highly specific marker for MAIT cells
RORA is a transcription factor characteristic of MAIT cell identity
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on MAIT cells for homeostatic maintenance
CCR6 is expressed on MAIT cells for mucosal tissue homing
TRGC2 expression reflects the innate-like TCR usage pattern of MAIT cells
CD8A marks the predominant CD8+ MAIT cell subset
GZMK (granzyme K) is characteristic of MAIT cell cytotoxic potential
NCR3 (NKp30) is expressed on MAIT cells reflecting their innate-like properties

LYZ (lysozyme) is a canonical myeloid cell marker
S100A9 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in myeloid cells

IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine characteristic of activated myeloid cells
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed on antigen-presenting myeloid cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is a signaling adaptor essential for myeloid cell function
FCER1G is a signaling adaptor broadly expressed in myeloid cells
AIF1 (Iba1) is a myeloid cell marker involved in phagocytosis
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule expressed by myeloid cells
EREG (epiregulin) is produced by activated myeloid cells
IL7R (CD127) is highly expressed on naive CD4+ T cells for homeostatic survival
